prompt:
Final lifestyle 3 — a photorealistic 1:1 lifestyle photograph: a glowing-skin woman in her late 20s sitting on a low rattan armchair on a sunlit modern apartment balcony, late morning, in BRIGHT CLEAN DIRECT NATURAL DAYLIGHT (open daylight, light city haze in the soft-focus background). She lifts ONE dark sugar-dusted sea moss gummy CUBE delicately between her thumb and index finger toward her parted lips with a soft warm smile, mid-bite. She wears a fitted oat-cream cropped sweater and high-rise white linen pants, hair in loose waves with face-framing strands, fresh-faced subtle glow.

>>> THE JAR — REALISTIC SCALE + CLEAN LIGHT BOUNCE <<<
A small realistic-sized Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (real supplement-bottle scale — roughly the size of a coffee mug, NOT oversized) sits on a small woven side-table beside her in the SAME bright direct daylight. SHARP CLEAN SPECULAR HIGHLIGHT — a bright vertical gleam — runs down the curved side of the jar's glossy black plastic. The jar's front label catches the light fully and CRISPLY — every teal/cyan and gold/yellow brand detail reads sharply. The label IS the brightest cleanly-lit element on the side-table. Beside the jar a small ceramic dish holds 5-6 dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES in the same daylight. The jar must match the provided reference image — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold accents, front label fully legible, 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend' side panel, lid off.

Background: a softly out-of-focus city balcony view — modern apartment buildings in soft daylight haze, a few potted herbs on a wood balcony rail, a single string of cafe-style lights in soft-focus, bright open daylight. Bright airy real-photograph feel.

Lighting: BRIGHT CLEAN OPEN DAYLIGHT wrapping BOTH the jar AND the woman uniformly — same crisp daylight bouncing cleanly off skin and glossy plastic. NO heavy shadows, NO orange tint, NO mood.

Framing: square 1:1, three-quarter view of the woman seated, gummy in the upper-third near her face, small realistic-sized jar in the lower-third with clear specular gleam.

Style: hyper-realistic photography, 50mm look, f/2.0 shallow depth, natural unretouched skin texture, sharp focus on jar with clean reflections, no AI artifacts.
